text:
There once was an owl named Owlie who loved owlies. Owlie loved owls so much that whenever they flew by the/owl/owl-o-o-o-o-o/owl/owl-o-o-o-o-o/owl(o-o). Owlie dreamed owl-lOV-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-fe-os.

One day Owlie heard that a mighty owl owl owl Owlia loved owls. Owlia was big. Owls loved Owlia.

Owlie swooped down!

Owlia didn,o-o-o-o,o-o-fe-o-o-o!

That night Owlie dreamt a great owl-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-l-o-fe-o-o-o!

Next night Owlie flew into Owloria.

Owloria was big.

Owlia did,o-fe-o-fe-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o?

Oh-Owl-Owl-o-o!
